description.overview: One of the smallest working terriers, Australian Terriers are spirited, courageous dogs who make excellent companions. They're affectionate but maintain typical terrier spunk.
description.history: The Australian Terrier originated in Australia.
description.temperament: Known for being spirited, alert, courageous.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their harsh, straight, dense coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of the smallest working terriers, Australian Terriers are spirited, courageous dogs who make excellent companions. They're affectionate but maintain typical terrier spunk.
